title: Slash Illager
description: This Slash Blade addon add Slash Blade master of Illager...
body:
![Slash Illager](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/Zo3Rf4Xd/images/64265976668148610df2be25a4d5db2b962f5f63.png)
Storm of Illager approaching....

Welcome to Slash Illager

## Summary

This mod is Slash Blade addon. and add slash blade master of Illager... called Blade Master

 

Do not approach this enemy. you will be cut. Like you cut the mob with slashblade...

 

Be carefull with raid...

 

## Credit

Blade Master(aka Samurai) From my mod Bagus Mob

Blade Master Model from Itz_BlueJacob

 

## Requiment

Slash Blade Resharped

Player Animator
